$deviceId..validate: newData.hasChildren(['uid','deviceId','state','studying','subject','visible','displayName','handle','lastChanged']) && newData.child('uid').val() === auth.uid && newData.child('deviceId').val() === $deviceId && (newData.child('state').val() === 'online' || newData.child('state').val() === 'offline') && newData.child('studying').isBoolean() && newData.child('visible').isBoolean() && newData.child('subject').isString() && newData.child('subject').val().length <= 30 && newData.child('displayName').isString() && newData.child('displayName').val().length <= 24 && newData.child('handle').isString() && newData.child('handle').val().matches(/^[a-z0-9_.]{3,20}$/) && newData.child('lastChanged').isNumber()
